messages.title: First public Garda release
body: Visible release history was reset to the Garda 1.0.0 baseline.
The public project line now uses the Garda name.

messages.title: Project memory refresh
body: Project memory mode was updated in 1.1.0.
Before starting task work, let your agent execute the project-memory refresh prompt so local project memory is current for the new workflow.

Garda self-guard is enabled by default for application workspaces: agents can no longer self-escalate into --orchestrator-work for protected Garda bundle edits. Operators can change the policy with garda workflow set --garda-self-guard on|off.
